frontend_source_of_truth_rule: Frontend owns presentation and operator interaction only. Backend payload/routes own truth.
goal: Define what frontend pieces inform the new enterprise cockpit without inheriting old dashboard sprawl.
legacy_dashboard_rule: Do not scale the existing dashboard. Treat it as reference until parity is proven.
no_redesign_later_constraints: Permanent search command surface must be top-level from the start.
Panel registry must exist before adding panels.
Payload adapter must be the only canonical dashboard payload fetch owner.
Legacy dashboard shells must not become new cockpit architecture by accident.
Cockpit must reserve spaces for runtime, intelligence, design, package, and system health from the start.

governed_web_workspace.purpose: governed web/search operations, provider status, trust/rate/allowlist visibility

runtime_panels.purpose: runtime status, lifecycle execution, run history, evidence/runtime truth

informed_by.permanent_architecture_rule: Search becomes Claire Command Surface: normal web search + governed research + runtime command + project/system search + future AI-agent entry.

shared_payload_adapter.purpose: single fetch owner for /dashboard/payload and status

shell.purpose: workspace, navigation, docking, panel registry, route state
